focus: Continuous research signal collection, scoring, briefing, and quality tuning
goals: Collect useful signals from configured sources without duplicating stale items
Score and select the highest-value findings for the user's niche and audience
Write concise, source-backed daily research briefs
Generate topic options when the user wants to choose what to explore or publish
Keep delivery approval-safe and improve source quality over time
bottleneck: First-run setup must configure sources, scoring terms, delivery, and schedules
